base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of credits_scroll — a ui (menu_screen) from 1987 mega man. End-credits scroll — 2818×507 wide-format crawl with character portraits of all 6 Robot Masters + team credits. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
